name: isometric
label: 等距盒子 / Isometric
preamble: Cute isometric 3D miniature icons: each object a tidy little isometric boxy form with soft rounded edges and clean flat-shaded facets, playful pastel palette, subtle form shading only, no cast shadow, object floating.

construction.grid: matched object scale; consistent live area
construction.angles: shared isometric angle (2:1) for the whole set
construction.shared_parts: consistent block construction and edge softness
construction.shadow: no cast/ground shadow; form shading only

notes: Cuts cleanest of the 3D-leaning styles when no ground shadow is drawn.
